summary: Read-only plan for two hydrated open refs. Both items have security-routing evidence in the job or preflight artifact, so no close, merge, label, comment, or fix action is planned.

actions.reason: The hydrated canonical issue is explicitly security-sensitive in the artifact, so it is out of ProjectClownfish mutation scope and should be routed to central OpenClaw security handling.
The job explicitly routes #58455 as a security-signal ref. Even aside from routing, failed proof and unresolved review findings block merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout in plan mode.
